events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault. Scenario: heavy industrial, transmitter installation, observed missing heat trace on freeze-prone impulse lines, in-service. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing heat trace on freeze-prone impulse lines can lead to freezing, line blockage, pressure measurement failure, possible overpressure/rupture or process upset. Risk high or critical? In-service freeze-prone lines: high, maybe critical if ambient below freezing and process safety. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, degraded? The impulse lines are degraded? Actually missing heat trace is installation defect/non-compliant. Could include "installed-defective", "non-compliant". Not failed yet, but potential failure mode: freeze blockage / burst impulse line / transmitter damage. Need percent_complete 100 (in-service). value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. confidence high ~0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: missing heat trace on freeze-prone impulse lines; non-compliance with winterization requirements; risk of freezing causing blockage, false reading, line rupture. actions: install heat trace per spec/drawing; insulate impulse lines; verify thermostat/control; inspect/test heat trace before freezing conditions; monitor ambient. rationale: heat trace required to prevent freezing of process fluid in impulse lines; absence is installation defect per API RP 551 and specs; in-service asset at risk. references: API RP 551, mfr manuals, project specs/drawings. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

    "Non-compliance with winterization and installation specifications",
    "Risk of impulse-line freezing leading to blockage, false transmitter reading, or line rupture"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install heat trace on affected impulse lines per engineered drawings and specifications",
    "Insulate and weatherproof impulse lines after heat-trace installation",
    "Verify heat-trace circuit continuity, thermostat setting, and energization",
    "Perform functional check of transmitter after winterization is complete",
    "Schedule inspection before onset of freezing conditions"
  ],
  "rationale": "Heat trace is required on impulse lines that are exposed to freezing conditions to keep the fill fluid or process fluid above its freeze point. Its absence is an installation defect that violates project specifications and good practice in API RP 551, creating a high risk of measurement failure, process upset, or physical damage while the asset is in service.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer heat-trace and transmitter installation manuals",
    "Project specifications and engineered drawings"
  ]
